title: Why postseason will determine Lakers’ Austin Reaves’ financial future: ‘A lot of skill’
description: A few weeks ago, Warriors coach Steve Kerr was asked what qualities he values most in a player.  He brought up three traits: Someone who loves the game, loves their teammates and is loved by their teammates.  Unprovoked, he then named an opponent as the embodiment of those qualities.  “I see it with Austin Reaves,” Kerr...

title: Will the King's US visit make a political difference?
description: As applause fades and banquet plates are cleared, it's up to politicians to build on Charles's historic trip.

title: King Charles hints at recent tension between U.S. and U.K. in address to Congress
description: In an address to a joint session of Congress, King Charles hinted at recent tension between the U.S. and U.K. over the war with Iran and trade. The king said, "whatever our differences, whatever disagreements we may have, we stand united in our commitment to uphold democracy." Nancy Cordes has more.

title: Supreme Court to weigh Trump's bid to end deportation shield for Haitians, Syrians
description: Today, the Supreme Court is set to consider the Department of Homeland Security's effort to terminate TPS both for Syria and Haiti.

title: Acting AG Blanche addresses Comey indictment, says Trump didn't direct him to pursue it
description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche spoke exclusively with "CBS Mornings" on Wednesday, addressing the Justice Department's second indictment of former FBI Director James Comey over a an Instagram post from Comey that showed seashells arranged in the sand to form the numbers "86 47." Blanche said President Trump didn't direct him to pursue the case. In a video message, Comey denied that he was threatening the president.

title: James Comey's Indictment Raises Double Standards Over '86 46' Posts
description: Questions are circulating about James Comey's indictment, citing previous "86 46" posts by Republicans.

title: Listen live: Supreme Court weighs Trump bid to curtail deportation protection program
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday morning will consider the Trump administration’s efforts to curtail the Temporary Protective Status (TPS) program, which offers protections against deportation for noncitizens who cannot safely return to their home countries for a variety of reasons. President Trump, as part of his immigration crackdown, is looking to terminate TPS for 13…

title: ‘I’m very late to the game’: I’m 48, earn $65,000, have $48,000 in debt and no retirement. Am I doomed?
description: “I do not have any inheritance from anyone coming my way as I lost most of my immediate family when young.”

title: Resurfaced clip of Johnny Carson's grace after Reagan shooting contrasts with Kimmel
description: Johnny Carson's classy response to the Reagan assassination attempt resurfaces online amid criticism of Jimmy Kimmel's joke about Melania Trump.

title: Waymo teams up with Waze to spot potholes faster
description: Waymo and Waze team up to detect potholes in real time using robotaxi sensors and driver reports, helping cities fix dangerous road damage more quickly.

title: Gunfire erupts near Seattle mayor’s event as families, children gather
description: Gunfire erupted near a Seattle community center while Mayor Katie Wilson attended an event with families and children, police said. No injuries reported.

title: Illinois Democratic governor bucks teachers' unions in support for statewide classroom phone ban
description: Gov. JB Pritzker, D-Ill., clashed with the Illinois Federation of Teachers over a statewide bill to ban cellphones in classrooms during instructional hours.

title: Punishment revealed for Yankees-Rangers fans after ugly fight
description: They all got the boot early, but at least they didn't have to spend the night in jail.

title: Chemistry issues could haunt Lakers if Austin Reaves returns in Game 5
description: If Austin Reaves returns to the starting lineup in Game 5, the Los Angeles Lakers face a tough lineup decision. Here’s who could head to the bench against the Rockets.
